summary: Audit user-journey coverage across end-to-end tests and propose smallest high-impact additions.

inputs.name: test_suite_path
inputs.description: Path to existing E2E suite and supporting fixtures.

inputs.name: critical_journeys
inputs.description: List of business-critical journeys expected in production.

inputs.name: risk_context
inputs.description: Optional launch or incident context to prioritize gaps.

outputs.name: journey_matrix
outputs.description: Coverage status by journey: covered, partial, or missing.

outputs.name: risk_notes
outputs.description: Business impact notes for missing assertions.

outputs.name: next_test_additions
outputs.description: Top three test additions ranked by impact and effort.

workflow_steps: Inventory current E2E tests and map them to named user journeys.
Classify each journey as covered, partial, or missing.
Attach risk level and likely regression impact per gap.
Recommend smallest high-impact additions with effort estimate.

verification.smoke_test: Run on a repo with at least five user journeys and confirm output includes matrix, risk notes, and three prioritized additions.
